equipment_name: Hot Strip Mill Main Drive Motor

maintenance_events.issue: Drive end vibration increased during finishing stand load changes.
maintenance_events.root_cause: Loose foundation bolt resonance amplified bearing housing vibration.
maintenance_events.action: Retorqued foundation bolts, checked coupling alignment, and trended vibration after load ramp.
maintenance_events.outcome: Vibration reduced from 8.4 mm/s to 5.9 mm/s after retorque.

maintenance_events.issue: Bearing temperature and vibration rose together after lubricant filter differential pressure alarm.
maintenance_events.root_cause: Lubricant filter restriction reduced bearing oil flow.
maintenance_events.action: Replaced lubricant filter and inspected drive end spherical roller bearing.
maintenance_events.outcome: Bearing temperature returned below 72 C and vibration stabilized below advisory threshold.

learning_notes: For RM-DRIVE-01, vibration with rising bearing temperature should prioritize lubrication and bearing inspection.
Foundation bolt looseness has previously produced vibration symptoms similar to bearing degradation.
